page_metadata.biotools__summary: LOCUS (Length Optimized Characterization of Unknown Spliceforms) is a dynamic-programming algorithm for finding the optimal set of splice sites in a genomic region of interest with estimated prior length information.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: LOCUS (Length Optimized Characterization of Unknown Spliceforms) is a dynamic-programming algorithm for finding the optimal set of splice sites in a genomic region of interest with estimated prior length information.
